name: its-not-about-the-coffee
description: Howard Behar's leadership principles from a life at Starbucks — ten principles of personal leadership centered on putting people first, building trust, thinking independently, and daring to dream big.
useCase: Learning authentic leadership, building people-centered organizations, developing trust and caring in the workplace, empowering independent thinking, and balancing purpose with performance.
knownRisks: The book reflects Behar's personal views and is not an official Starbucks leadership manual
Some stories are told from memory years after the events and may contain normal embellishments
The principles are simple in concept but difficult in practice — expectation management advised
Written from the perspective of a for-profit retail context; may not directly apply to non-profit or government settings
